evals.name: fill-real-gap-april-2026
evals.prompt: It's April 27th 2026. The post-election polls in ~/kosningaspa/R/scrape_polls.R last entry is 24 Feb 2026 Maskína. Capacent Gallup publishes Þjóðarpúls roughly the 15th of each month so there should be three new Gallup polls (Feb / Mar / Apr) and probably one or two Maskína polls. Find them, verify against the source articles, and add them to the tribble in scrape_polls.R. Then regenerate data/post_election_polls.csv. Don't refit the model and don't touch the metill-platform — those are my next steps.
evals.expected_output: tribble in R/scrape_polls.R has new verified rows; data/post_election_polls.csv regenerated; clean hand-off summary

evals.name: no-new-polls
evals.prompt: Hey can you check if there are any new polls to add? I want to make sure the Fylgisvakt is showing fresh data.
evals.expected_output: skill discovers nothing new (assuming gap was filled in eval 0) and reports cleanly without running the scraper or modifying any files

evals.name: single-new-gallup
evals.prompt: I think Þjóðarpúls dropped this morning — RÚV usually publishes around 16:00 on the 15th. Add it.
evals.expected_output: skill scopes the search narrowly (latest Gallup only), verifies one article, adds one row to tribble; doesn't churn through Maskína side
